currentState: Chapter 8 hardens their relationship into mutual usefulness under stress. Corin sees Sylvanas operate a city snatch and escape with terrifying precision; Sylvanas sees Corin hold local cover, contribute the naming fragment, and accept the stay-behind work without collapsing.
powerDynamic: Sylvanas still holds command, speed, and physical truth. Corin holds buried records, local rumor, and the continuation of the Andorhal fight after she departs. The power gap is unchanged, but the trust in his usefulness is wider now.

physicalDynamics.pattern: Sylvanas stays standing where she can watch the door while Corin spreads papers under his hands, making the relationship feel like field command evaluating a useful local contact in real time.
Corin spends much of the chapter trying to stay ordinary around Sylvanas's violence and speed, then ends it taking her assignment instead of shrinking from it.

nameUsage.sylvanasCallsCorin: Still clipped and functional, but chapter 8 gives the tone more trust because the assignment she leaves him is larger than a quick task.
nameUsage.corinCallsSylvanas: Still careful, now mixed with the knowledge that he has seen exactly what her command feels like under active pursuit.

history.event: Corin gives Sylvanas the route logic, false shortage pattern, and vanished-report context she needs to take him seriously at once.
Sylvanas effectively validates Corin by asking for the part that matters first and using what he gives her without institutional condescension.
Corin helps the capture by maintaining his clerk disguise in the lane rather than drawing attention back onto the trap.
His local fragments and her interrogation pressure meet at the same missing name, helping the chapter pivot from dead witness to named architect.
Sylvanas leaves Corin local with real responsibility, which is the clearest sign yet that she rates him above disposable helper status.

trajectory: Unknown local mage -> useful city contact -> trusted Andorhal steward under field command.

stateHistory.currentState: Wary but efficient respect. Corin sees instantly that Sylvanas will only care about the proof, and Sylvanas rewards that by paying attention the moment he produces the right pages.
